concepts.title: Properties of cube root of unity
concepts.conceptBody:
Properties of cube roots of unity 

1. $\quad{w}^3=1$ 

2. $\quad 1+w+w^2=0$ 

3. $\quad 1+w^{=}+w^n \mathbf{n}=\left\{\begin{array}{l}0, \text { if } n \text { is not a multiple of } S \\ 3, \text { if } \mathrm{n} \text { is a multiple of } \mathrm{S}\end{array}\right\}$ 

4.    cube roots of -1 are $-1,-\mathrm{w},-\mathrm{w}^2$ 

5.    $z^3-1=(z-1)(z-w)\left(z-w^3\right)$ 

6.    $z^3+1=(z+1)(z+w)(z+w)$ 

7.    $a^3+b^3=(a+b)(a+b w)\left(a+b w^2\right)$ 

8.    $a^3-b^3=(a-b)(a-b w)\left(a-b w^2\right)$ 

9. $\quad a^2+b^2+c^2-a b-b c-c a=\left(a+b w+c w^2\right)\left(a+b w^2+c w^2\right)$ 

10.   $a^3+b^3+c^3-3 a b c=(a+b+c)\left(a+b w+c w^2\right)\left(a+b w^2+c w\right)$ 

Tip: â€˘ $\left| \text{w} \right|=\left| {{\text{w}}^{2}} \right|=1$

  • $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ Square root of $i=\pm \left( \frac{1+i}{\sqrt{2}} \right)$
  • $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ Square root of $\text{w}=\pm {{\text{w}}^{2}}$
  • $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ Square root of ${{\text{w}}^{2}}=\pm \text{w}$
  • You can also remember that $\text{w},{{\text{w}}^{2}}$ are also the roots of equation ${{\text{x}}^{2}}+\text{x}+1$ as this equation is encountered very often}
